src: AI-Powered Predictive Maintenance & Fault Diagnosis through Model Context Protocol. An open-source framework for integrating Large Language Models with predictive maintenance and fault diagnosis workflows.
ja: Model Context Protocolを活用したAI駆動の予知保全・故障診断。大規模言語モデルを予知保全・故障診断ワークフローと統合するオープンソースフレームワーク
